title: hibbertia holtzei
intro: Hibbertia holtzei, also known as the yellow peely, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hibbertia holtzei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, respiratory problems, and digestive issues.
